## Our path to a useful quantum computer
PsiQuantum was founded on the understanding that any practical path to million-qubit systems must fully exploit the trillions of dollars and decades of work invested into the semiconductor industry. We’re building a quantum computer the same way we build a supercomputer — using the same mature fabs, the same contract manufacturers, and the same fiberoptic networking.

## Omega: A manufacturable chipset
Blueprint Slider with Video
Omega
Source
Interferometer
Edge Coupler
Switch
Detector
## Mass-manufacturable quantum chips
When we think of manufacturing for quantum computing, we typically imagine a small-scale university cleanroom or an R&D fab which can accommodate exotic materials, atomic scale fabrication, and novel devices — and, by extension, a long road to scale.   
  
PsiQuantum's wafers are now built by the thousands, at the highest possible level of technical maturity — in a high-volume, commercial semiconductor foundry. Our Omega platform integrates superconducting single photon detectors, single photon sources, and a high-performance optical switch into a single ultra-low-loss silicon nitride platform, containing all the components we need for optical quantum computing, each having beyond-state-of-the-art performance.   
  
Learn more in our manuscript published in [_Nature_](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-08820-7). 
![Omega chipset](https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/68273ad12736f24ea4a50eac/1747401427505/blup1.png)
## Source
PsiQuantum's qubits are encoded using telecom-band (1550nm) single photons, generated on-chip using resonantly-enhanced spontaneous four-wave-mixing. 
SOURCE PURITY ~ 99.8%
HOM VISIBILITY, UNTUNED RINGS ~ 99.7%
## Interferometer
To perform single-qubit and two-qubit gates, we split and recombine photons using on-chip interferometers.   
  
Thanks to the extreme process control of our manufacturing process, our interferometers achieve up to 99.999% fidelity. 
EXTINCTION RATIO > 50dB
## Edge Coupler
We're fortunate that we can network chips using standard telecom fiber, but it's important we don't lose qubits at the interface. Chip-to-fiber coupling must be ultra-low-loss.  
  
We’ve reduced industry standard losses from ~50% to ~1%, enabling die-to-die networking at error-correction-compatible levels. 
COUPLING LOSS ~ 50mdB
## Switch
The biggest obstacle to the scaleup of photonic quantum computing is the fact that the photon sources and gates are both nondeterministic. The key to overcoming this challenge is fast, low-loss optical switching. PsiQuantum built the biggest molecular beam epitaxy tool in the world and successfully delivered a 300mm manufacturing process for optical switches based on Barium Titanate (BTO) — the "holy grail" of optical switching materials. 
LOSS ~ 10dB/m
ELECTRO OPTIC COEFFICIENT ~ 1000pm/V
## Detector
We use single photons as our quantum information carriers.  
  
Superconducting films, biased near their transition point, enable efficient single-photon detection. We have introduced near-perfect superconducting films into our manufacturing flow, and now manufacture millions of waveguide-integrated photon-number-resolving superconducting single-photon detectors at GlobalFoundries.   
  
We’ve extended this to photon-number resolution, critical for entanglement and error reduction. 
ON-CHIP EFFICIENCY ~ 98%
## Inside a utility-scale quantum computer
Blueprint Slider 2 (Enhanced)
Wafer
Chip
Package
Blade
Cabinet
Quantum Computer
## Wafer
Photonic components, including single photon sources, single-photon detectors, and an ultra-high-performance optical switch, are fabricated in a high-volume semiconductor foundry on standard silicon wafers.  
  
Photonic qubits avoid exotic materials and fabrication processes and are able to leverage the existing reliability, volume, and precision of standard semiconductor manufacturing. 
WAFER SIZE 300MM
DEVICES TESTED >1M
LITHOGRAPHY NODE 45NM
![Wafer](https://static1.squarespace.com/static/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/t/69cb029df1b50518bcf5e637/1774912181517/Blank_BTO_Wafer.jpg)
## Chip
Photonic qubits are implemented by repurposing integrated photonics technology, originally developed for telecom and datacenter networking applications.  
  
Entangled states — specially designed to implement quantum error-correcting codes — are created and measured using fusion gates.  
  
Nondeterministic photon sources and gate operations are made scalable via a combination of multiplexing and loss-tolerant error correcting codes 
SINGLE-QUBIT FIDELITY 99.99% [1](https://www.psiquantum.com/technology#footnotes)
TWO-QUBIT FIDELITY >99% [2](https://www.psiquantum.com/technology#footnotes)
![Chip](https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/685c56753af6eb44b65ae337/1750881914481/chip-2.jpg)
## Package
Photonic chips are integrated with cryogenic control electronics into a manufacturable package.  
  
Despite the fact that some of these packages must be operated at cryogenic temperature, we are able to use conventional technologies — PCBs, copper heat sinks and bump bonding. As a result, PsiQuantum can leverage conventional contract manufacturing to build large numbers of packages quickly.  
  
Photonic qubits can be networked and modularized using standard optical fiber, without transduction — a huge advantage at scale. 
![Package](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/46f11c00-68eb-4b73-be73-172ffd72c848/technology+-+package+blurred+logos.png?content-type=image%2Fpng)
## Blade
Building a utility-scale quantum computer requires installing thousands of photonic packages. We adopt a proven model from classical computing: modular, rack-based infrastructure. Conventional supercomputers are increasingly turning to liquid cooling as density and TDP increases. We cool our chips using liquid helium, which ﬂows through a cryogenically-cooled copper backplane — analogous to the backplane in a conventional server rack.   
  
Our blade is the scalable unit of cryogenic quantum computing racking. It houses many individual photonic-packages networked together with fiber and control signals. 
![Blade](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/ac8e1e8b-51ee-4fc9-8e6d-49834afcc510/Blade+%28transparent%29.png?content-type=image%2Fpng)
## Cabinet
The dilution refrigerator—or ‘chandelier’—has become an iconic image of quantum computing, yet it is severely constrained in both the number of chips it can cool simultaneously and its overall cooling capacity.   
  
Because photons are unaﬀected by heat, our systems can operate at temperatures more than 100 times higher than those required for superconducting qubits. This higher operating temperature enables PsiQuantum to move beyond the chandelier to far simpler, high-density cryogenic cabinets, analogous to datacenter racks. Each cabinet provides thousands of times the cooling power of the largest dilution refrigerator ever built,[3](https://www.psiquantum.com/technology#footnotes) and can accommodate hundreds of quantum chips. 
COOLING POWER PER CABINET ~30W
![Cabinet](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/6b8713cf-1a5a-4e68-b0bb-572244714223/Beta+%28transparent%29+%281%29.png?content-type=image%2Fpng)
## Quantum Computer
Most architectures for quantum computing will require major physical infrastructure in order to deliver enough qubits for commercially useful applications and to scale far beyond.  
  
In 2024, PsiQuantum announced two landmark partnerships with the Australian Federal and Queensland State governments, as well as the State of Illinois and the City of Chicago, to build its first utility-scale quantum computers in Brisbane and Chicago. Recognizing quantum as a critical capability for the future, these partnerships underscore the urgency toward building and deploying million-qubit systems. In 2025, PsiQuantum broke ground on America's largest quantum computing project at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park in Chicago––and the company will soon break ground on its facility in Australia. 
![Quantum Computer Site](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/02157603-cb01-43bd-b394-e54066159e16/Site+Schematic+-+Perspective.png?content-type=image%2Fpng)
  1. [Quantum state tomography of a dual-rail photonic qubit with on-chip single photon sources and superconducting detectors](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2404.17570). No multiplexing.
  2. [Bell state projection](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2404.17570). No multiplexing.
  3. [Colossus](https://news.fnal.gov/2022/12/its-colossal-creating-the-worlds-largest-dilution-refrigerator/), ~1mW @ 10mK

      <script>
        const activeClassNameSoftwareSlider1 = 'software-slider1-active';
        let currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1 = 0;

        function renderSoftwareSlider1(index, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl) {
            allSlideItems.forEach(item => {
                item.classList.remove(activeClassNameSoftwareSlider1);
            });

            const targetSlideElement = allSlideItems[index];

            if (targetSlideElement) {
                targetSlideElement.classList.add(activeClassNameSoftwareSlider1);
            }
            updateActivePillSoftwareSlider1(index, paginationContainerEl);
        }
        
        function createPaginationSoftwareSlider1(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems) {
            allSlideItems.forEach((slideItem, index) => {
                const pillText = slideItem.dataset.pillText || `Slide ${index + 1}`;
                const pill = document.createElement('div');
                pill.classList.add('software-slider1-pill');
                pill.dataset.index = index; 
                
                const pillTextSpan = document.createElement('span');
                pillTextSpan.textContent = pillText;
                pill.appendChild(pillTextSpan);
                
                paginationContainerEl.appendChild(pill); 

                pill.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    if (currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1 !== index) { 
                        currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1 = index;
                        renderSoftwareSlider1(currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl);
                    }
                });
            });
        }

        function updateActivePillSoftwareSlider1(activeIndex, paginationContainerEl) {
            const pills = paginationContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.software-slider1-pill');
            pills.forEach((pill, index) => {
                pill.classList.toggle(activeClassNameSoftwareSlider1, index === activeIndex);
            });
        }

        function initSoftwareSlider1() {
            const paginationContainerEl = document.getElementById('softwareSlider1PaginationContainer');
            const allSlidesWrapperEl = document.getElementById('softwareSlider1AllSlidesWrapper');

            if (!paginationContainerEl || !allSlidesWrapperEl) {
                console.warn('Software Slider 1: Essential container elements not found. Slider not initialized.');
                return;
            }
            
            const allSlideItems = allSlidesWrapperEl.querySelectorAll('.software-slider1-item');

            if (!allSlideItems.length) {
                 console.warn('Software Slider 1: No slide items found. Slider not initialized.');
                return;
            }

            createPaginationSoftwareSlider1(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems);
            renderSoftwareSlider1(currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl); 
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initSoftwareSlider1);
        } else {
            initSoftwareSlider1();
        }
    </script>

    <script>
    (function() { 
        let sliderContentEl, sliderTrackEl, paginationActiveBarEl, paginationSegmentsClickable;
        let actualPagesCount = 0; 
        let currentPageIndex = 0; 
        let currentTrackIndex = 1; 
        let isDragging = false;
        let startX, currentX, initialTrackX = 0;
        const dragThreshold = 50; 
        
        function getSliderWidth() {
            if (!sliderContentEl) { 
                return 0;
            }
            return sliderContentEl.offsetWidth; 
        }

        function setupSlider() {
            sliderContentEl = document.getElementById('single-image-caption-slider-content');
            sliderTrackEl = document.getElementById('single-image-caption-slider-track');
            paginationActiveBarEl = document.getElementById('single-image-caption-slider-pagination-active-bar');
            paginationSegmentsClickable = document.querySelectorAll('.single-image-caption-slider-pagination-segment-clickable');

            if (!sliderContentEl || !sliderTrackEl ) {
                return;
            }
            
            const initialItemElements = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.single-image-caption-slider-item-container');

            if (initialItemElements.length === 0) {
                sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 
                actualPagesCount = 0;
                updatePagination(); 
                return; 
            }
            
            const initialItemsHTML = [];
            initialItemElements.forEach(itemEl => {
                initialItemsHTML.push(itemEl.outerHTML);
            });

            sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 

            const dataForSlider = initialItemsHTML.map(itemHTML => [itemHTML]); 
            actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
            
            if (actualPagesCount === 0) { 
                 updatePagination();
                 return; 
            }

            const slidesToRender = [
                dataForSlider[actualPagesCount - 1], 
                ...dataForSlider,                    
                dataForSlider[0]                     
            ];
            
            const sliderPageWidth = getSliderWidth(); 

            slidesToRender.forEach((pageDataItemsHTML, index) => { 
                if (!pageDataItemsHTML || pageDataItemsHTML.length === 0) { 
                    return; 
                }
                const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                pageElement.className = 'single-image-caption-slider-page'; 
                pageElement.style.width = `${sliderPageWidth}px`; 
                pageElement.innerHTML = pageDataItemsHTML.join(''); 
                sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
            });
            
            currentPageIndex = 0; 
            currentTrackIndex = 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
            sliderContentEl.classList.add('single-image-caption-slider-initialized');
            
            attachEventListeners();
        }
        
        function goToTrackIndex(trackIndex, animate = true) {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getSliderWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex; 
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('single-image-caption-slider-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('single-image-caption-slider-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            }
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.replaceWith(segment.cloneNode(true)); 
                });
                document.querySelectorAll('.single-image-caption-slider-pagination-segment-clickable').forEach(segment => {
                     segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;
                        if (actualPagesCount === 1) {
                            pageIndexToNavigate = 0;
                        } else if (actualPagesCount === 2) { 
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0;
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = 1; 
                        } else { 
                           if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                           else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.max(0, Math.min(actualPagesCount - 1, Math.floor((actualPagesCount -1) / 2) )); 
                           else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount -1; 
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });
            }
            
            window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
            window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
        }

        function handleResize() {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.single-image-caption-slider-page'); 
            const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
            pages.forEach(page => {
                page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
            });
            goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
        }

        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); 
    </script>  
  
    <script>
    (function() { 
        let sliderContentEl, sliderTrackEl, paginationActiveBarEl, paginationSegmentsClickable;
        let actualPagesCount = 0; 
        let currentPageIndex = 0; 
        let currentTrackIndex = 1; 
        let isDragging = false;
        let startX, currentX, initialTrackX = 0;
        const dragThreshold = 50; 
        const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 640; 
        let previousIsMobile = isMobileView();

        function isMobileView() {
            return window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT;
        }
        
        function getSliderWidth() {
            if (!sliderContentEl) { 
                console.error("SquareImageSlider: getSliderWidth - sliderContentEl não está definido ainda.");
                return 0;
            }
            return sliderContentEl.offsetWidth; 
        }

        function setupSlider() {
            console.log("SquareImageSlider: Iniciando setupSlider."); 

            sliderContentEl = document.getElementById('square-image-slider-content');
            sliderTrackEl = document.getElementById('square-image-slider-track');
            paginationActiveBarEl = document.getElementById('square-image-slider-pagination-active-bar');
            paginationSegmentsClickable = document.querySelectorAll('.square-image-slider-pagination-segment-clickable');

            if (!sliderContentEl || !sliderTrackEl ) {
                console.error("SquareImageSlider: Elementos essenciais do slider não encontrados. Abortando setup.");
                return;
            }
             if (!paginationActiveBarEl) {
                console.warn("SquareImageSlider: Elemento #square-image-slider-pagination-active-bar não encontrado.");
            }
            if (paginationSegmentsClickable.length !== 3) { 
                console.warn(`SquareImageSlider: Esperava 3 .square-image-slider-pagination-segment-clickable, encontrou ${paginationSegmentsClickable.length}.`);
            }
            
            const initialItemElements = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.square-image-slider-item-container');
            console.log(`SquareImageSlider: Encontrados ${initialItemElements.length} itens no HTML.`);

            if (initialItemElements.length === 0) {
                console.warn("SquareImageSlider: Nenhum item encontrado no HTML do track. O slider ficará vazio.");
                sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 
                actualPagesCount = 0;
                updatePagination(); 
                return; 
            }
            
            const initialItemsHTML = [];
            initialItemElements.forEach(itemEl => {
                initialItemsHTML.push(itemEl.outerHTML);
            });

            sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 

            const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
            let dataForSlider; 
            
            if (currentIsMobile) {
                dataForSlider = initialItemsHTML.map(itemHTML => [itemHTML]); 
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
                console.log(`SquareImageSlider: Visualização Mobile. Páginas: ${actualPagesCount}`);
            } else {
                dataForSlider = [];
                const itemsPerPageDesktop = 2; // 2 items per page on desktop
                for (let i = 0; i < initialItemsHTML.length; i += itemsPerPageDesktop) {
                    dataForSlider.push(initialItemsHTML.slice(i, i + itemsPerPageDesktop)); 
                }
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
                console.log(`SquareImageSlider: Visualização Desktop. Páginas (grupos de ${itemsPerPageDesktop}): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            }
            
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length > 0 ) { 
                 console.warn("SquareImageSlider: actualPagesCount é 0. Verifique a lógica de agrupamento ou o número de itens HTML.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return; 
            } else if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length === 0) {
                 console.log("SquareImageSlider: Nenhum item para processar.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return;
            }

            const slidesToRender = [
                dataForSlider[actualPagesCount - 1], 
                ...dataForSlider,                    
                dataForSlider[0]                     
            ];
            
            const sliderPageWidth = getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderPageWidth === 0) {
                console.warn("SquareImageSlider: getSliderWidth() retornou 0.");
            }

            slidesToRender.forEach((pageDataItemsHTML, index) => { 
                if (!pageDataItemsHTML || pageDataItemsHTML.length === 0) { 
                    console.warn(`SquareImageSlider: Tentando renderizar uma página vazia no índice do track ${index}.`);
                    return; 
                }
                const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                pageElement.className = 'square-image-slider-page'; 
                pageElement.style.width = `${sliderPageWidth}px`; 
                pageElement.innerHTML = pageDataItemsHTML.join(''); 
                sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
            });
            
            currentPageIndex = 0; 
            currentTrackIndex = 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
            previousIsMobile = currentIsMobile; 
            sliderContentEl.classList.add('square-image-slider-initialized');
            console.log(`SquareImageSlider: Configuração concluída. Páginas lógicas: ${actualPagesCount}`);
            
            attachEventListeners();
        }
        
        function goToTrackIndex(trackIndex, animate = true) {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getSliderWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex; 
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('square-image-slider-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('square-image-slider-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            console.log("SquareImageSlider: Anexando event listeners.");
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            } else {
                console.error("SquareImageSlider: Não foi possível anexar 'transitionend'.");
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            } else {
                 console.error("SquareImageSlider: Não foi possível anexar listeners de drag.");
            }
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.replaceWith(segment.cloneNode(true)); 
                });
                document.querySelectorAll('.square-image-slider-pagination-segment-clickable').forEach(segment => {
                     segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;

                        if (isMobileView()) { 
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount -1) / 2); 
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount - 1; 
                        } else { // Desktop: up to 3 pages
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.max(0, Math.min(actualPagesCount - 1, 1)); 
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount -1; 
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });

            } else {
                 console.warn("SquareImageSlider: Nenhum segmento de paginação clicável encontrado.");
            }
            
            window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
            window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
            console.log("SquareImageSlider: Event listeners anexados.");
        }

        function handleResize() {
             const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
            if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                console.log("SquareImageSlider: Mudança de visualização detectada, reconfigurando.");
                setupSlider(); 
            } else {
                if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.square-image-slider-page'); 
                const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                pages.forEach(page => {
                    page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                });
                goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                updatePagination(); 
            }
        }

        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); 
    </script>

                sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = '';

            }

                 updatePagination();

    <script>
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.career-quote-slide');
                const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.career-pagination-dot');
                let currentSlideIndex = 0;

                if (slides.length === 0 || dots.length === 0 || slides.length !== dots.length) {
                    console.error("Career Quote slider: Number of slides and pagination dots do not match or elements not found.");
                    return;
                }

                function showSlide(index) {
                    if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) return;

                    slides[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('career-active-quote');
                    dots[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('active');

                    slides[index].classList.add('career-active-quote');
                    dots[index].classList.add('active');

                    currentSlideIndex = index;
                }

                dots.forEach(dot => {
                    dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const targetIndex = parseInt(dot.getAttribute('data-slide-target'), 10);
                        showSlide(targetIndex);
                    });
                });

                if (slides.length > 0) {
                    showSlide(0);
                }
            });
        })();
    </script>

            window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
            console.log("ApplicationPageSlider1: Event listeners anexados.");
        }

        function handleResize() {
             const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
            if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                console.log("ApplicationPageSlider1: Mudança de visualização detectada, reconfigurando.");
                setupSlider(); 
            } else {
                if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.application-page-slider-1-page'); 
                const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                pages.forEach(page => {
                    page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                });
                goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                updatePagination(); 
            }
        }

        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); 
    </script>



    <script>
        const activeClassNameSlider2 = 'blueprint-slider2-slide-active';
        const activeImageClassName = 'blueprint-slider2-slide-gallery-image-active';
        const activeDotClassName = 'blueprint-slider2-slide-active-dot';
        let currentSlideIndexSlider2 = 0;

        function setupImageGallery(slideItemElement) {
            const galleryWrapper = slideItemElement.querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-slide-image-gallery-wrapper');
            const dotsContainer = slideItemElement.querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-slide-image-dots');
            const images = galleryWrapper.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-content-image');
            
            dotsContainer.innerHTML = ''; // Clear previous dots

            if (images.length <= 1) { // No dots needed for 0 or 1 image
                if (images.length === 1) images[0].classList.add(activeImageClassName);
                return;
            }

            images.forEach((img, index) => {
                img.classList.remove(activeImageClassName); // Reset all images
                if (index === 0) {
                    img.classList.add(activeImageClassName); // Activate first image
                }

                const dot = document.createElement('span');
                dot.classList.add('blueprint-slider2-slide-image-dot');
                dot.dataset.imageIndex = index;
                if (index === 0) {
                    dot.classList.add(activeDotClassName);
                }
                dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    setActiveImage(galleryWrapper, dotsContainer, index);
                });
                dotsContainer.appendChild(dot);
            });
        }

        function setActiveImage(galleryWrapper, dotsContainer, imageIndex) {
            const images = galleryWrapper.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-content-image');
            const dots = dotsContainer.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-image-dot');

            images.forEach((img, idx) => {
                img.classList.toggle(activeImageClassName, idx === imageIndex);
            });
            dots.forEach((dot, idx) => {
                dot.classList.toggle(activeDotClassName, idx === imageIndex);
            });
        }

        function renderSlideSlider2(index, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl) {
            allSlideItems.forEach(item => {
                item.classList.remove(activeClassNameSlider2);
            });

            const targetSlideElement = allSlideItems[index];

            if (targetSlideElement) {
                targetSlideElement.classList.add(activeClassNameSlider2);
                setupImageGallery(targetSlideElement);
            }
            updateActivePillSlider2(index, paginationContainerEl);
        }
        
        function createPaginationSlider2(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems) {
            let maxWidth = 0;
            const tempPills = []; 

            allSlideItems.forEach((slideItem, index) => {
                const pillText = slideItem.dataset.pillText || `Slide ${index + 1}`;
                const pill = document.createElement('div');
                pill.classList.add('blueprint-slider2-slide-pill');
                pill.dataset.index = index; 
                
                const pillTextSpan = document.createElement('span');
                pillTextSpan.textContent = pillText;
                pill.appendChild(pillTextSpan);
                
                paginationContainerEl.appendChild(pill); 
                if (pill.offsetWidth > maxWidth) {
                    maxWidth = pill.offsetWidth;
                }
                tempPills.push(pill); 

                pill.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    if (currentSlideIndexSlider2 !== index) { 
                        currentSlideIndexSlider2 = index;
                        renderSlideSlider2(currentSlideIndexSlider2, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl);
                    }
                });
            });

            tempPills.forEach(pill => {
                pill.style.minWidth = `${maxWidth}px`;
            });
        }

        function updateActivePillSlider2(activeIndex, paginationContainerEl) {
            const pills = paginationContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-pill');
            pills.forEach((pill, index) => {
                pill.classList.toggle(activeClassNameSlider2, index === activeIndex);
            });
        }

        function initSlider2() {
            const paginationContainerEl = document.getElementById('blueprintSlider2PaginationContainer');
            const allSlidesWrapperEl = document.getElementById('blueprintSlider2AllSlidesWrapper');

            if (!paginationContainerEl || !allSlidesWrapperEl) {
                console.warn('Blueprint Slider 2: Essential container elements not found. Slider not initialized.');
                return;
            }
            
            const allSlideItems = allSlidesWrapperEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-item');

            if (!allSlideItems.length) {
                 console.warn('Blueprint Slider 2: No slide items found. Slider not initialized.');
                return;
            }

            createPaginationSlider2(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems);
            renderSlideSlider2(currentSlideIndexSlider2, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl); 
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initSlider2);
        } else {
            initSlider2();
        }
    </script>

<script>
    // A propriedade "mainTitle" foi removida pois não é mais utilizada.
    const slidesData = [
        { id: 'omega', pillText: 'Omega' },
        { id: 'source', pillText: 'Switch' },
        { id: 'detector', pillText: 'Edge Coupler' },
        { id: 'switch', pillText: 'Detector' },
        { id: 'interferometer', pillText: 'Interferometer' },
        { id: 'edge-coupler', pillText: 'Source' }
    ];

    const activeClassName = 'blueprint-slider1-slide-active';
    let currentSlideIndex = 0;

    // A função foi simplificada para não receber mais o 'mainTitleEl'.
    function renderSlide(index, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl) {
        const slideData = slidesData[index];

        // O bloco de código que animava e mudava o texto do título foi removido.

        allSlideItems.forEach(item => {
            item.classList.remove(activeClassName);
        });

        const targetSlideId = 'blueprint-slider1-slide-' + slideData.id;
        const newActiveSlide = document.getElementById(targetSlideId);

        if (newActiveSlide) {
            newActiveSlide.classList.add(activeClassName);
        }
        updateActivePill(index, paginationContainerEl);
    }

    // A função foi simplificada para não receber mais o 'mainTitleEl'.
    function createPagination(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems) {
        slidesData.forEach((slide, index) => {
            const pill = document.createElement('div');
            pill.classList.add('blueprint-slider1-slide-pill');
            pill.dataset.index = index; 
            
            const pillTextSpan = document.createElement('span');
            pillTextSpan.textContent = slide.pillText;
            pill.appendChild(pillTextSpan);

            pill.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (currentSlideIndex !== index) { 
                    currentSlideIndex = index;
                    // A chamada para renderSlide foi atualizada.
                    renderSlide(currentSlideIndex, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl);
                }
            });
            paginationContainerEl.appendChild(pill);
        });
    }

    function updateActivePill(activeIndex, paginationContainerEl) {
        const pills = paginationContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider1-slide-pill');
        pills.forEach((pill, index) => {
            if (index === activeIndex) {
                pill.classList.add(activeClassName);
            } else {
                pill.classList.remove(activeClassName);
            }
        });
    }

    function initSlider() {
        // Removida a busca pelo 'mainTitleEl'.
        const paginationContainerEl = document.getElementById('blueprintSlider1PaginationContainer');
        const allSlidesWrapperEl = document.getElementById('blueprintSlider1AllSlidesWrapper');

        // A verificação do 'mainTitleEl' foi removida da condição.
        if (!paginationContainerEl || !allSlidesWrapperEl || !allSlidesWrapperEl.children.length) {
            console.warn('Blueprint Slider 1: Essential elements not found. Slider not initialized.');
            return;
        }
        
        const allSlideItems = allSlidesWrapperEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider1-slide-item');

        if (!allSlideItems.length) {
             console.warn('Blueprint Slider 1: No slide items found. Slider not initialized.');
             return;
        }

        // As chamadas de função foram atualizadas.
        createPagination(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems);
        renderSlide(currentSlideIndex, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl); 
    }

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initSlider);
    } else {
        initSlider();
    }
</script>

<script>
    (function() { 
        let sliderContentEl, sliderTrackEl, paginationActiveBarEl, paginationSegmentsClickable;
        let actualPagesCount = 0; 
        let currentPageIndex = 0; 
        let currentTrackIndex = 1; 
        let isDragging = false;
        let startX, currentX, initialTrackX = 0;
        const dragThreshold = 50; 
        const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 640; 
        let previousIsMobile = isMobileView();

        function isMobileView() {
            return window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT;
        }
        
        function getSliderWidth() {
            if (!sliderContentEl) { 
                console.error("AboutPageSlider2: getSliderWidth - sliderContentEl não está definido ainda.");
                return 0;
            }
            return sliderContentEl.offsetWidth; 
        }

        function setupSlider() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider2: Iniciando setupSlider."); 

            sliderContentEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-2-content');
            sliderTrackEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-2-track');
            paginationActiveBarEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-2-pagination-active-bar');
            paginationSegmentsClickable = document.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-2-pagination-segment-clickable');

            if (!sliderContentEl || !sliderTrackEl ) {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider2: Elementos essenciais do slider (#about-page-slider-2-content ou #about-page-slider-2-track) não encontrados. Abortando setup.");
                return;
            }
             if (!paginationActiveBarEl) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider2: Elemento #about-page-slider-2-pagination-active-bar não encontrado.");
            }
            // For this slider, we expect 3 clickable segments for pagination.
            // If we wanted 4 direct page navigations for desktop's 4 pages, we'd need 4 clickable segments.
            // Sticking to 3 for now, as per previous slider's pagination style.
            if (paginationSegmentsClickable.length !== 3) { 
                console.warn(`AboutPageSlider2: Esperava 3 .about-page-slider-2-pagination-segment-clickable, encontrou ${paginationSegmentsClickable.length}.`);
            }
            
            const initialItemElements = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-2-item-container');
            console.log(`AboutPageSlider2: Encontrados ${initialItemElements.length} itens (.about-page-slider-2-item-container) no HTML.`);

            if (initialItemElements.length === 0) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider2: Nenhum item encontrado no HTML do track. O slider ficará vazio.");
                sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 
                actualPagesCount = 0;
                updatePagination(); 
                return; 
            }
            
            const initialItemsHTML = [];
            initialItemElements.forEach(itemEl => {
                initialItemsHTML.push(itemEl.outerHTML);
            });

            sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 

            const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
            let dataForSlider; 
            
            if (currentIsMobile) {
                dataForSlider = initialItemsHTML.map(itemHTML => [itemHTML]); 
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; // e.g., 16 items = 16 pages
                console.log(`AboutPageSlider2: Visualização Mobile. Número de páginas (itens): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            } else {
                dataForSlider = [];
                const itemsPerPageDesktop = 4; // 4 items per page on desktop
                for (let i = 0; i < initialItemsHTML.length; i += itemsPerPageDesktop) {
                    dataForSlider.push(initialItemsHTML.slice(i, i + itemsPerPageDesktop)); 
                }
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; // e.g., 16 items / 4 per page = 4 pages
                console.log(`AboutPageSlider2: Visualização Desktop. Número de páginas (grupos de ${itemsPerPageDesktop}): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            }
            
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length > 0 ) { 
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider2: actualPagesCount é 0 após processar os itens. Verifique a lógica de agrupamento ou o número de itens HTML. O slider ficará vazio.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return; 
            } else if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length === 0) {
                 console.log("AboutPageSlider2: Nenhum item para processar, slider permanecerá vazio.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return;
            }

            const slidesToRender = [
                dataForSlider[actualPagesCount - 1], 
                ...dataForSlider,                    
                dataForSlider[0]                     
            ];
            
            const sliderPageWidth = getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderPageWidth === 0) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider2: getSliderWidth() retornou 0.");
            }

            slidesToRender.forEach((pageDataItemsHTML, index) => { 
                if (!pageDataItemsHTML || pageDataItemsHTML.length === 0) { 
                    console.warn(`AboutPageSlider2: Tentando renderizar uma página vazia ou indefinida no índice do track ${index}.`);
                    return; 
                }
                const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                pageElement.className = 'about-page-slider-2-page'; 
                pageElement.style.width = `${sliderPageWidth}px`; 
                pageElement.innerHTML = pageDataItemsHTML.join(''); 
                sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
            });
            
            currentPageIndex = 0; 
            currentTrackIndex = 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
            previousIsMobile = currentIsMobile; 
            sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-2-initialized');
            console.log(`AboutPageSlider2: Configuração do slider concluída. Páginas lógicas: ${actualPagesCount}, Track Index inicial: ${currentTrackIndex}`);
            
            attachEventListeners();
        }
        
        function goToTrackIndex(trackIndex, animate = true) {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getSliderWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex; 
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-2-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('about-page-slider-2-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider2: Anexando event listeners.");
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            } else {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider2: Não foi possível anexar 'transitionend': sliderTrackEl não encontrado.");
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            } else {
                 console.error("AboutPageSlider2: Não foi possível anexar listeners de drag: sliderContentEl não encontrado.");
            }
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;

                        if (isMobileView()) { // Mobile: 16 items, 16 pages
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; // First item
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount -1) / 2); // Middle item (e.g. page 7 for 16 pages)
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount - 1; // Last item
                        } else { // Desktop: 4 items per page, 4 pages
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; // Page 1
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = 1; // Page 2 (can adjust if needed for 4 pages)
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount -1; // Page 4 (last page)
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });
            } else {
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider2: Nenhum .about-page-slider-2-pagination-segment-clickable encontrado.");
            }
            
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
                if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                    console.log("AboutPageSlider2: Mudança de visualização detectada (mobile/desktop), reconfigurando o slider.");
                    setupSlider(); 
                } else {
                    if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                    const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-2-page'); 
                    const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                    pages.forEach(page => {
                        page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                    });
                    goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                    updatePagination(); 
                }
            });
            console.log("AboutPageSlider2: Event listeners anexados.");
        }
        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); 
    </script>
