            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('about-page-slider-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Anexando event listeners.");
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            } else {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: Não foi possível anexar 'transitionend': sliderTrackEl não encontrado.");
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            } else {
                 console.error("AboutPageSlider: Não foi possível anexar listeners de drag: sliderContentEl não encontrado.");
            }
            // Listeners de mousemove e mouseup/touchend no document para melhor experiência
            // Estes podem ser anexados mesmo se sliderContentEl não for encontrado, pois não dependem dele diretamente
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;

                        if (isMobileView()) {
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount - 1) / 2); 
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount - 1; 
                        } else {
                            pageIndexToNavigate = segmentIndex; 
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });
            } else {
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum .about-page-pagination-segment-clickable encontrado para anexar listeners de clique.");
            }
            
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
                if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                    console.log("AboutPageSlider: Mudança de visualização detectada (mobile/desktop), reconfigurando o slider.");
                    setupSlider(); // Re-setup completo se o tipo de visualização mudar
                } else {
                    // Apenas ajusta larguras se o tipo de visualização não mudou
                    if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                    const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-page'); 
                    const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                    pages.forEach(page => {
                        page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                    });
                    goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                    updatePagination(); 
                }
            });
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Event listeners anexados.");
        }

        // Usar addEventListener para 'load' é geralmente mais seguro do que atribuir window.onload diretamente
        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); // Fim da IIFE
    </script>


<script>
        // IIFE to encapsulate
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.quote-slide');
                const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination-dot');
                let currentSlideIndex = 0;

                if (slides.length === 0 || dots.length === 0 || slides.length !== dots.length) {
                    console.error("Quote slider: Number of slides and pagination dots do not match or elements not found.");
                    return;
                }

                function showSlide(index) {
                    if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) return;

                    slides[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('active-quote');
                    dots[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('active');

                    slides[index].classList.add('active-quote');
                    dots[index].classList.add('active');

                    currentSlideIndex = index;
                }

                dots.forEach(dot => {
                    dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const targetIndex = parseInt(dot.getAttribute('data-slide-target'), 10);
                        showSlide(targetIndex);
                    });
                });

                showSlide(0);

            });
        })();
    </script>

<script>
        // IIFE para encapsular
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.expandable-list .list-item');
                const imageDisplay = document.getElementById('image-display');
                let activeItem = null;

                if (listItems.length === 0 || !imageDisplay) {
                    console.error("Elementos da lista ou display de imagem não encontrados.");
                    return;
                }

                // Função para calcular e definir a posição/altura do indicador
                function positionIndicator(item) {
                    const indicator = item.querySelector('.item-indicator');
                    const contentWrapper = item.querySelector('.item-content-wrapper');
                    const header = item.querySelector('.item-header');
                    const description = item.querySelector('.item-description');

                    if (!indicator || !contentWrapper || !header || !description) return;

                    // Posição do topo do header RELATIVA AO list-item
                    const headerTopRelativeToListItem = contentWrapper.offsetTop + header.offsetTop;

                    // Calcula a altura do conteúdo visível
                    let contentHeight = header.offsetHeight;
                    if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                        const descMarginTop = parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(description).marginTop) || 0;
                        // Usa scrollHeight para altura real da descrição
                        contentHeight += descMarginTop + description.scrollHeight;
                    } else {
                         // Se inativo, a altura deve ser zero para o cálculo do indicador
                         contentHeight = 0; // Garante que indicador inativo tenha altura 0 no cálculo
                    }

                    // Aplica os estilos ao indicador
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        indicator.style.top = `${headerTopRelativeToListItem}px`;
                        // Define altura zero se não estiver ativo, caso contrário usa a calculada
                        indicator.style.height = item.classList.contains('active') ? `${Math.max(0, contentHeight)}px` : '0px';
                    });
                }

                // Função para trocar imagem com fade
                function changeImageWithFade(imageUrl) {
                     if (!imageDisplay) return;
                     imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', `url('${imageUrl}')`);
                     imageDisplay.classList.add('fade-in');
                     setTimeout(() => {
                         imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${imageUrl}')`;
                         imageDisplay.classList.remove('fade-in');
                         imageDisplay.style.removeProperty('--bg-image-before');
                     }, 800);
                 }
                 imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', 'none');


                function setActiveItem(clickedItem) {
                    if (clickedItem === activeItem) return;

                    // Desativa o item anterior
                    if (activeItem) {
                        const oldDesc = activeItem.querySelector('.item-description');
                        activeItem.classList.remove('active'); // Remove classe do LI
                        if (oldDesc) {
                            oldDesc.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                            oldDesc.style.marginTop = '0px';
                        }
                         // Reseta explicitamente a altura do indicador antigo
                         const oldIndicator = activeItem.querySelector('.item-indicator');
                         if (oldIndicator) oldIndicator.style.height = '0px';
                    }

                    // Ativa o novo item
                    const newDesc = clickedItem.querySelector('.item-description');
                    clickedItem.classList.add('active'); // Adiciona classe ao LI
                    if (newDesc) {
                        newDesc.style.marginTop = '0.5rem';
                        // Define max-height para animar abertura
                         requestAnimationFrame(() => { // Garante cálculo após DOM update
                             newDesc.style.maxHeight = newDesc.scrollHeight + "px";
                             // Posiciona o indicador APÓS definir maxHeight
                             positionIndicator(clickedItem); // Chama para definir altura e top
                         });
                    } else {
                        // Se não houver descrição, posiciona baseado só no header
                        positionIndicator(clickedItem);
                    }

                    activeItem = clickedItem; // Atualiza referência

                    // Atualiza imagem
                    const imageSrc = clickedItem.getAttribute('data-image');
                    if (imageSrc) {
                        changeImageWithFade(imageSrc);
                    }
                }

                // Adiciona listeners de clique
                listItems.forEach(item => {
                    item.addEventListener('click', () => { // Listener no LI
                        setActiveItem(item);
                    });

                    // Listener para ajustar indicador após transição da descrição
                    const description = item.querySelector('.item-description');
                     if (description) {
                         description.addEventListener('transitionend', (event) => {
                             if (event.propertyName === 'max-height' && item.classList.contains('active')) {
                                 // Recalcula altura/posição do indicador após animação
                                 positionIndicator(item);
                             }
                         });
                     }
                });

                // Ativa o primeiro item inicialmente
                if (listItems.length > 0) {
                    const firstItem = listItems[0];
                    const initialImageSrc = firstItem.getAttribute('data-image');

                    if (initialImageSrc && imageDisplay) {
                        imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${initialImageSrc}')`;
                    }
                    // Usa a função setActiveItem para inicializar corretamente
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        setActiveItem(firstItem);
                    }, 50);
                }

                 // Reposiciona indicador no resize
                 window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                     if (activeItem) {
                         setTimeout(() => positionIndicator(activeItem), 100);
                     }
                 });

            });
        })();
    </script>


<script>
// IIFE para encapsular
(function() {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
        const paginationItems = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination-item');
        const paginationBarContainer = document.querySelector('.pagination-bar-container');

        let paginationIndicator = document.querySelector('.pagination-indicator');
        if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
            console.log("Slider principal: Criando o elemento '.pagination-indicator' dinamicamente.");
            paginationIndicator = document.createElement('div');
            paginationIndicator.classList.add('pagination-indicator');
            paginationBarContainer.appendChild(paginationIndicator);
        }

        if (slides.length === 0 || paginationItems.length === 0 || slides.length !== paginationItems.length) {
            console.error("Slider principal: Número de slides e itens de paginação não correspondem ou elementos não encontrados. Verifique as classes '.slide' e '.pagination-item'.");
            return;
        }
        if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) { // Verificação ajustada: só erro se o container existe mas o indicador não pôde ser criado/achado
            console.error("Slider principal: Elemento '.pagination-indicator' não pôde ser encontrado ou criado.");
            // Não retorna aqui, pois o indicador pode ser opcional para a funcionalidade básica se o CSS o esconder
        }
        if (!paginationBarContainer) {
            console.error("Slider principal: Elemento '.pagination-bar-container' não encontrado. O indicador não pode ser posicionado e o scrollIntoView não funcionará como esperado.");
            // Considerar retornar se paginationBarContainer é essencial para outras funcionalidades além do indicador
        }

        // Função para atualizar o slide ativo, item de paginação ativo e indicador
        // Adicionamos o parâmetro 'isInitialLoad' com valor padrão 'false'
        function goToSlide(index, isInitialLoad = false) {
            if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) {
                console.error("Índice do slide fora dos limites:", index);
                return;
            }

            const currentActiveSlide = document.querySelector('.slide.active-slide');
            const currentActivePaginationItem = document.querySelector('.pagination-item.active-pagination-item');
            if (currentActiveSlide) {
                currentActiveSlide.classList.remove('active-slide');
            }
            if (currentActivePaginationItem) {
                currentActivePaginationItem.classList.remove('active-pagination-item');
            }

            slides[index].classList.add('active-slide');
            paginationItems[index].classList.add('active-pagination-item');

            if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[index];
                const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;

                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                    const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                    if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                        paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                        paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                    }
                });

                // MODIFICAÇÃO AQUI:
                // Só executa scrollIntoView se NÃO for a carga inicial
                if (!isInitialLoad) {
                    targetPaginationItem.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', inline: 'center', block: 'nearest' });
                }
            }
        }

        paginationItems.forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('mouseover', () => {
                const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                    goToSlide(slideIndex); // Chamada normal, isInitialLoad será false por padrão
                } else {
                    console.error("Atributo 'data-slide-index' não encontrado ou inválido no item:", item);
                }
            });

            item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                    goToSlide(slideIndex); // Chamada normal, isInitialLoad será false por padrão
                } else {
                    console.error("Atributo 'data-slide-index' não encontrado ou inválido no item:", item);
                }
            });
        });

        setTimeout(() => {
            // MODIFICAÇÃO AQUI: Passamos 'true' para isInitialLoad
            goToSlide(0, true);
        }, 100);


        let resizeTimeout;
        window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
            clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
            resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                const currentActiveIndex = Array.from(paginationItems).findIndex(item => item.classList.contains('active-pagination-item'));
                if (currentActiveIndex !== -1 && paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                    const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                    const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                            const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                            const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                            paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }, 250);
        });

        if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
            let scrollTimeout;
            paginationBarContainer.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
                scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    const currentActiveIndex = Array.from(paginationItems).findIndex(item => item.classList.contains('active-pagination-item'));
                    if (currentActiveIndex !== -1) {
                        const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                        const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                                const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                                paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }, 150);
            }, { passive: true });
        }
    });
})();
</script>


<script>
  // IIFE para encapsular o código e evitar conflitos globais
  (function() {
    // Espera o HTML carregar
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      const divider = document.getElementById('scroll-divider');

      // Verifica se o elemento divisor existe
      if (!divider) {
        console.error("Elemento divisor (#scroll-divider) não encontrado. Verifique o ID no HTML.");
        return; // Interrompe se não encontrar
      }

      let startTime = null; // Para rastrear o tempo da animação
      const animationDuration = 3000; // Duração de um ciclo COMPLETO (ida e volta) em ms (ex: 3 segundos)
      const mainColor = '#7735fc';      // Cor principal/escura
      const highlightColor = '#ba97fc'; // Cor clara que vai se mover
      // *** AUMENTADO O TAMANHO DA FAIXA ***
      const bandWidthPercent = 90;      // Largura da faixa clara em porcentagem (ex: 70% - bem maior)

      // Função que será chamada repetidamente para animar
      const animateDivider = (timestamp) => {
        // Garante que o divisor ainda existe no DOM
        if (!document.body.contains(divider)) {
            console.log("Elemento divisor removido do DOM, parando a animação.");
            return;
        }

        if (!startTime) {
          startTime = timestamp; // Define o tempo inicial na primeira execução
        }

        const elapsedTime = timestamp - startTime;
        // Calcula o progresso dentro de um ciclo (0 a 1)
        const progressRaw = (elapsedTime % animationDuration) / animationDuration;

        // --- Lógica de Animação Modificada (Ping-Pong) ---

        // Usa cosseno para criar um movimento suave de ida e volta (0 -> 1 -> 0)
        // Math.cos(progressRaw * Math.PI * 2) vai de 1 a -1 e volta a 1.
        // (1 - cos) / 2 mapeia isso para o intervalo 0 a 1 e volta a 0.
        const angle = progressRaw * Math.PI * 2; // Ângulo para um ciclo completo (0 a 2*PI)
        const pingPongProgress = (1 - Math.cos(angle)) / 2; // Valor oscilante entre 0 e 1

        // Calcula a posição central da faixa clara (0% a 100%) com base no progresso oscilante
        const centerPercent = pingPongProgress * 100;

        // Calcula as posições de início e fim da transição para a cor clara
        // Garante que as posições fiquem dentro de 0 e 100
        const startHighlight = Math.max(0, centerPercent - bandWidthPercent / 2);
        const endHighlight = Math.min(100, centerPercent + bandWidthPercent / 2);

        // Define o gradiente para ir de cima para baixo ('to bottom')
        divider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to bottom,
          ${mainColor} 0%,
          ${mainColor} ${startHighlight}%,
          ${highlightColor} ${centerPercent}%,
          ${mainColor} ${endHighlight}%,
          ${mainColor} 100%
        )`;
        // --- Fim da Lógica Modificada ---

        // Solicita o próximo quadro da animação, criando o loop
        requestAnimationFrame(animateDivider);
      };

      // Inicia o loop da animação
      requestAnimationFrame(animateDivider);

    });
  })(); // Executa a IIFE
</script>



<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Seleciona o botão de fechar
    const closeButton = document.getElementById('close-business-bar');
    // Seleciona o wrapper da barra de negócios
    const businessBarWrapper = document.getElementById('business-bar-wrapper');
    // Seleciona o corpo do documento
    const bodyElement = document.body;

    // Verifica se ambos os elementos existem para evitar erros
    if (closeButton && businessBarWrapper && bodyElement) {
        closeButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
            // Adiciona a classe 'hidden' ao wrapper da barra para escondê-la
            businessBarWrapper.classList.add('hidden');
            
            // Adiciona a classe 'business-bar-hidden' ao body para ajustar o header
            bodyElement.classList.add('business-bar-hidden');
            
            // Opcional: Log para confirmar que o evento ocorreu (bom para debug)
            // console.log('Business bar fechada!');
        });
    } else {
        if (!closeButton) {
            console.error('Botão #close-business-bar não encontrado.');
        }
        if (!businessBarWrapper) {
            console.error('Elemento #business-bar-wrapper não encontrado.');
        }
    }
});
</script>

  <div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content=""><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">PsiQuantum was founded on the understanding that any practical path to million-qubit systems must fully exploit the trillions of dollars and decades of work invested into the semiconductor industry.     <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Blueprint Slider with Video</title>

    <!-- Inter Font Import -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    <style>
        /* --- START: BLUEPRINT SLIDER CSS --- */

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1440px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 30px;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            margin: auto;
            padding: 0rem 0rem;
            color: #ffffff;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Mobile-first: Horizontal scroll for pills */
        .blueprint-showcase-slider-pagination {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: nowrap;
            gap: 15px; 
            width: 100%;
            overflow-x: auto;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            padding-right: 1rem;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-pagination::-webkit-scrollbar {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Desktop: Pills wrap and fill space */
        @media (min-width: 992px) {
            .blueprint-showcase-slider-pagination {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
                overflow-x: visible;
                padding-right: 0;
            }
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-pill {
            font-weight: 300;
            font-size: 16px !important;
            padding: 10px 25px;
            text-align: center;
            border-radius: 40px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: border-color 0.3s ease, background-color 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #ffffff;
            background-color: transparent;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            isolation: isolate;
            color: #ffffff;
            white-space: nowrap; 
            min-width: 140px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
       
        @media (min-width: 992px) {
            .blueprint-showcase-slider-pill {
                min-width: auto;
            }
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-pill:hover {
            border-color: #7e58f5;
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-pill span {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1; 
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-pill.active {
            background-color: #2b1e55;
            border-color: #7e58f5;
        }
       
        .blueprint-showcase-slider-pill.currently-active {
            font-weight: 500;
        }
       
        .pill-progress {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            height: 100%;
            width: 0;
            background-color: #7e58f5;
            z-index: -1;
        }
       
        #blueprintShowcaseSliderAllSlidesWrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-item {
            display: flex;
            gap: 75px;
            padding: 20px 0;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }
       
        @media (min-width: 992px) {
            .blueprint-showcase-slider-item {
                opacity: 0;
                transition: opacity 0.5s ease-out;
                position: absolute;
                top: 0;
                left: 0;
                width: 100%;
                visibility: hidden;
            }
             .blueprint-showcase-slider-item.active {
                opacity: 1;
                position: relative;
                visibility: visible;
            }
        }
       
         @media (max-width: 991px) {
             #blueprintShowcaseSliderAllSlidesWrapper {
                display: flex;
                overflow-x: auto;
                scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
                -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
                scrollbar-width: none;
                align-items: flex-start;
             }
             #blueprintShowcaseSliderAllSlidesWrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
                display: none;
             }
             .blueprint-showcase-slider-item {
                flex: 0 0 100%;
                scroll-snap-align: start;
                box-sizing: border-box;
                padding-bottom: 0px;
             }
        }


        .blueprint-showcase-slider-column-text {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 300px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-column-image {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 300px;
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-content-image,
        .blueprint-showcase-slider-content-video {
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            aspect-ratio: 718 / 435;
            max-width: 100%;
            border-radius: 5px;
            object-fit: cover;
            display: block;
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-content-title {
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            font-size: 36px !important;
            margin: 0;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description {
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin: 0;
            transition: max-height 0.5s ease-in-out;
        }
       
        .blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description a {
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        @media (max-width: 991px) {
            .blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description.collapsed {
                overflow: hidden;
                position: relative;
            }

                    <h2 class="blueprint-showcase-slider-content-title">Mass-manufacturable quantum chips</h2>
                    <p class="blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description">
                        When we think of manufacturing for quantum computing, we typically imagine a small-scale university cleanroom or an R&D fab which can accommodate exotic materials, atomic scale fabrication, and novel devices — and, by extension, a long road to scale. <br><br>
                        PsiQuantum's wafers are now built by the thousands, at the highest possible level of technical maturity — in a high-volume, commercial semiconductor foundry. Our Omega platform integrates superconducting single photon detectors, single photon sources, and a high-performance optical switch into a single ultra-low-loss silicon nitride platform, containing all the components we need for optical quantum computing, each having beyond-state-of-the-art performance. <br><br>
                        Learn more in our manuscript published in <a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-08820-7" target="_blank"><u>Nature</u></a>.
                    </p>

                        PsiQuantum's qubits are encoded using telecom-band (1550nm) single photons, generated on-chip using resonantly-enhanced spontaneous four-wave-mixing.

                    <p class="blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description">
                        To perform single-qubit and two-qubit gates, we split and recombine photons using on-chip interferometers. <br><br>
                        Thanks to the extreme process control of our manufacturing process, our interferometers achieve up to 99.999% fidelity.
                    </p>

                        We're fortunate that we can network chips using standard telecom fiber, but it's important we don't lose qubits at the interface. Chip-to-fiber coupling must be ultra-low-loss.<br><br>
                        We’ve reduced industry standard losses from ~50% to ~1%, enabling die-to-die networking at error-correction-compatible levels.

          <!-- SWITCH -->
<div id="blueprint-showcase-slider-slide-switch" class="blueprint-showcase-slider-item">
    <div class="blueprint-showcase-slider-column-text">
        <h2 class="blueprint-showcase-slider-content-title">Switch</h2>
        <p class="blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description">
            The biggest obstacle to the scaleup of photonic quantum computing is the fact that the photon sources and gates are both nondeterministic. 
            The key to overcoming this challenge is fast, low-loss optical switching. PsiQuantum built the biggest molecular beam epitaxy tool in the 
            world and successfully delivered a 300mm manufacturing process for optical switches based on Barium Titanate (BTO) — the "holy grail" of optical switching materials.
        </p>
        <div class="blueprint-showcase-slider-specs">

                <div class="blueprint-showcase-slider-column-text">
                    <h2 class="blueprint-showcase-slider-content-title">Detector</h2>
                    <p class="blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description">
                        We use single photons as our quantum information carriers.<br><br>
                        Superconducting films, biased near their transition point, enable efficient single-photon detection. We have introduced near-perfect superconducting films into our manufacturing flow, and now manufacture millions of waveguide-integrated photon-number-resolving superconducting single-photon detectors at GlobalFoundries. <br><br>
                        We’ve extended this to photon-number resolution, critical for entanglement and error reduction.
                    </p>
                    <div class="blueprint-showcase-slider-specs">
                        <div class="blueprint-showcase-slider-spec-item">
                            <span class="blueprint-showcase-slider-spec-title">ON-CHIP EFFICIENCY</span>

                        <source src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/6849cbf596302004f748d5d0/1749666822564/Detector-1.mp4" type="video/mp4">

    <script>
    (function() {
        // Order updated to: Omega, Source, Interferometer, Edge Coupler, Switch, Detector
        const slidesData = [
            { id: 'omega', pillText: 'Omega' },
            { id: 'source', pillText: 'Source' },
            { id: 'interferometer', pillText: 'Interferometer' },
            { id: 'edge-coupler', pillText: 'Edge Coupler' },
            { id: 'switch', pillText: 'Switch' },
            { id: 'detector', pillText: 'Detector' }
        ];

        const activeClassName = 'active';
        const currentlyActiveClassName = 'currently-active';
        let currentSlideIndex = 0;
        let autoPlayInterval = null;

        function scrollActivePillIntoView(paginationContainerEl) {
            const activePill = paginationContainerEl.querySelector('.blueprint-showcase-slider-pill.active');
            if (activePill) {
                activePill.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest', inline: 'center' });
            }
        }

        function updatePills(index, paginationContainerEl) {
             const pills = paginationContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-showcase-slider-pill');
             pills.forEach((pill, pillIndex) => {
                 pill.classList.toggle(activeClassName, pillIndex === index);
                 pill.classList.toggle(currentlyActiveClassName, pillIndex === index);
            });
        }

        function showSlide(index, allSlideItems) {
            if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 991px)").matches) {
                const sliderWrapper = document.getElementById('blueprintShowcaseSliderAllSlidesWrapper');
                const slideToScrollTo = allSlideItems[index];
                if (sliderWrapper && slideToScrollTo) {
                    sliderWrapper.scrollTo({ left: slideToScrollTo.offsetLeft, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            } else {
                 allSlideItems.forEach((item, idx) => {
                     item.classList.toggle(activeClassName, idx === index);
                 });
            }
        }
       
        function renderDesktopSlide(index, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl) {
            allSlideItems.forEach(item => item.classList.remove(activeClassName));
            const slideData = slidesData[index];
            const targetSlideId = 'blueprint-showcase-slider-slide-' + slideData.id;
            const newActiveSlide = document.getElementById(targetSlideId);
            if (newActiveSlide) newActiveSlide.classList.add(activeClassName);

            const pills = paginationContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-showcase-slider-pill');
            pills.forEach(p => p.classList.remove(currentlyActiveClassName));
            pills.forEach((pill, pillIndex) => {
                const progress = pill.querySelector('.pill-progress');
                pill.classList.toggle(activeClassName, pillIndex === index);
                pill.classList.toggle(currentlyActiveClassName, pillIndex === index);
                if(progress) { progress.style.transition = 'none'; progress.style.width = '0%'; }
            });
        }

        function createPagination(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems) {
            slidesData.forEach((slide, index) => {
                const pill = document.createElement('div');
                pill.classList.add('blueprint-showcase-slider-pill');
                pill.dataset.index = index;
               
                const progress = document.createElement('div');
                progress.classList.add('pill-progress');
                pill.appendChild(progress);

                const pillTextSpan = document.createElement('span');
                pillTextSpan.textContent = slide.pillText;
                pill.appendChild(pillTextSpan);

                pill.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    if (autoPlayInterval) { clearInterval(autoPlayInterval); autoPlayInterval = null; }
                    if (currentSlideIndex !== index) {
                        currentSlideIndex = index;
                        if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 991px)").matches) {
                            showSlide(currentSlideIndex, allSlideItems);
                            updatePills(currentSlideIndex, paginationContainerEl);
                            scrollActivePillIntoView(paginationContainerEl);
                        } else {
                            renderDesktopSlide(currentSlideIndex, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl);
                        }
                    }
                });
                paginationContainerEl.appendChild(pill);
            });
        }
        
        function handleMobileContentHeight() {
            if (!window.matchMedia("(max-width: 991px)").matches) return;

            const allSlidesWrapperEl = document.getElementById('blueprintShowcaseSliderAllSlidesWrapper');
            const allSlideItems = allSlidesWrapperEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-showcase-slider-item');
            if (allSlideItems.length === 0) return;

            const firstDesc = allSlideItems[0].querySelector('.blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description');
            if (!firstDesc) return;
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                const baseHeight = firstDesc.offsetHeight;

                allSlideItems.forEach((item) => {
                    const description = item.querySelector('.blueprint-showcase-slider-content-description');
                    const textColumn = item.querySelector('.blueprint-showcase-slider-column-text');
                    if (!description || !textColumn) return;

                    const existingBtn = textColumn.querySelector('.see-more-btn');
                    if (existingBtn) existingBtn.remove();
                    
                    description.classList.remove('collapsed');
                    description.style.maxHeight = '';

                    if (description.scrollHeight > baseHeight + 5) {
                        description.classList.add('collapsed');
                        description.style.maxHeight = `${baseHeight}px`;

                        const seeMoreBtn = document.createElement('button');
                        seeMoreBtn.textContent = 'See more ->';
                        seeMoreBtn.className = 'see-more-btn';
                        description.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', seeMoreBtn);

                        seeMoreBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                            description.classList.remove('collapsed');
                            description.style.maxHeight = description.scrollHeight + 'px';
                            seeMoreBtn.remove();
                        }, { once: true });
                    }
                });
            }, 100);
        }

        function initSlider() {
            const paginationContainerEl = document.getElementById('blueprintShowcaseSliderPaginationContainer');
            const allSlidesWrapperEl = document.getElementById('blueprintShowcaseSliderAllSlidesWrapper');
            if (!paginationContainerEl || !allSlidesWrapperEl) return;
           
            const allSlideItems = allSlidesWrapperEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-showcase-slider-item');
            if (!allSlideItems.length) return;

            paginationContainerEl.innerHTML = '';
            createPagination(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems);

            if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 991px)").matches) {
                updatePills(currentSlideIndex, paginationContainerEl);
                showSlide(currentSlideIndex, allSlideItems);
                handleMobileContentHeight();

                let scrollTimeout;
                allSlidesWrapperEl.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                    clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
                    scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                        const scrollLeft = allSlidesWrapperEl.scrollLeft;
                        const slideWidth = allSlidesWrapperEl.offsetWidth;
                        const newIndex = Math.round(scrollLeft / slideWidth);
                        if (newIndex !== currentSlideIndex) {
                            currentSlideIndex = newIndex;
                            updatePills(currentSlideIndex, paginationContainerEl);
                            scrollActivePillIntoView(paginationContainerEl);
                        }
                    }, 150);
                });

            } else {
                renderDesktopSlide(currentSlideIndex, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl); 
            }
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initSlider);
        } else {
            initSlider();
        }

        let resizeTimeout;
        window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
            clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
            resizeTimeout = setTimeout(initSlider, 250);
        });
    })();
    </script>






  
</div>
</div></div></div></div></div>
    </div>
  
  </div>

  <title>Blueprint Slider 2 (Enhanced)</title>

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    /* --- START: BLUEPRINT SLIDER 2 CSS (ENHANCED) --- */
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-container{
      width:100%;max-width:1440px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:30px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;margin:auto;padding:0rem;color:#fff;box-sizing:border-box
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pagination{
      display:flex;flex-wrap:nowrap;gap:15px;width:100%;overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none;padding-right:1rem;box-sizing:border-box
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pagination::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
    @media (min-width:992px){
      .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pagination{flex-wrap:wrap;overflow-x:visible;padding-right:0}
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill{
      font-weight:300;font-size:16px !important;padding:10px 25px;text-align:center;border-radius:40px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .3s ease,background-color .3s ease;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #fff;background-color:transparent;box-sizing:border-box;isolation:isolate;color:#fff;white-space:normal;min-width:140px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center
    }
    @media (min-width:992px){
      .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill{flex-grow:1;white-space:nowrap}
      .pill--no-grow{flex-grow:0 !important}
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill:hover{border-color:#7e58f5}
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill span{position:relative;z-index:1}
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill.active{background-color:#2b1e55;border-color:#7e58f5}
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill.currently-active{font-weight:500}
    .pill-progress{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;width:0;background-color:#7e58f5;z-index:-1}

    #blueprintSlider2OutterAllSlidesWrapper{position:relative}

    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item{
      display:flex;gap:75px;padding:20px 0;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-start
    }

    @media (min-width:992px){
      #blueprintSlider2OutterAllSlidesWrapper{transition:height .4s ease-in-out}
      .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item{opacity:0;transition:opacity .5s ease-out;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;visibility:hidden}
      .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item.active{opacity:1;position:relative;visibility:visible}
    }

    @media (max-width:991px){
      body.sqs-edit-mode-active .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-container{display:none}
      #blueprintSlider2OutterAllSlidesWrapper{display:flex;overflow-x:auto;scroll-snap-type:x mandatory;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none;align-items:flex-start;height:auto !important}
      #blueprintSlider2OutterAllSlidesWrapper::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
      .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item{flex:0 0 100%;scroll-snap-align:start;box-sizing:border-box;padding-bottom:0}
    }

    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-text{
      flex:1;min-width:300px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:15px;max-width:636px !important
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-image{
      flex:1;min-width:300px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;border-radius:5px
    }

    /* Simple single-image wrapper (no carousel) */
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-image-wrapper{
      width:100%;max-width:718px;aspect-ratio:718/435;overflow:hidden;border-radius:5px
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-image{
      width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;border-radius:5px;user-select:none;-webkit-user-drag:none
    }

    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-title{
      font-weight:300;font-size:36px !important;margin:0;padding-bottom:20px
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description{
      font-weight:300;font-size:16px !important;line-height:1.6;margin:0;color:#fff;transition:max-height .5s ease-in-out
    }
    @media (max-width:991px){
      .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description.collapsed{overflow:hidden;position:relative}
      .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description.collapsed::after{
        content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;height:60px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(18,18,18,0), #000);pointer-events:none
      }
    }
    .see-more-btn{
      display:inline-block;margin-top:15px;padding:8px 20px;font-weight:500;font-size:14px;color:#fff;background-color:transparent;border:1px solid #7e58f5;border-radius:40px;cursor:pointer;transition:background-color .3s ease;text-align:center
    }
    .see-more-btn:hover{background-color:#2b1e55}

    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-specs{
      display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #333;padding-top:10px
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-item{
      display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid #333
    }
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-title{font-weight:500;font-size:14px !important;color:#fff}
    .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-value{font-weight:300;font-size:14px !important;color:#fff}

    @media (max-width:991px){
      .blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item{flex-direction:column-reverse;gap:40px}
    }
  </style>


  <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-container">
    <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pagination" id="blueprintSlider2OutterPaginationContainer"><div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill active currently-active" data-index="0"><div class="pill-progress" style="transition: width 7s linear; width: 100%;"></div><span>Wafer</span></div><div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill" data-index="1"><div class="pill-progress" style="transition: none; width: 0%;"></div><span>Chip</span></div><div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill" data-index="2"><div class="pill-progress" style="transition: none; width: 0%;"></div><span>Package</span></div><div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill" data-index="3"><div class="pill-progress" style="transition: none; width: 0%;"></div><span>Blade</span></div><div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill" data-index="4"><div class="pill-progress" style="transition: none; width: 0%;"></div><span>Cabinet</span></div><div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill pill--no-grow" data-index="5"><div class="pill-progress" style="transition: none; width: 0%;"></div><span>Quantum Computer</span></div></div>

    <div id="blueprintSlider2OutterAllSlidesWrapper" style="height: 497px;">
      <!-- WAFER -->
      <div id="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-computer-site" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item active" data-pill-text="Wafer">
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-text">
          <h2 class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-title">Wafer</h2>
          <p class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description">
            Photonic components, including single photon sources, single-photon detectors, and an ultra-high-performance optical switch, are fabricated in a high-volume semiconductor foundry on standard silicon wafers.<br><br>
            Photonic qubits avoid exotic materials and fabrication processes and are able to leverage the existing reliability, volume, and precision of standard semiconductor manufacturing.
          </p>
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-specs">
            <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-item">
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-title">WAFER SIZE</span>
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-value">300MM</span>
            </div>
            <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-item">
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-title">DEVICES TESTED</span>
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-value">>1M</span>
            </div>
            <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-item">
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-title">LITHOGRAPHY NODE</span>
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-value">45NM</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-image">
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-image-wrapper">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/t/69cb029df1b50518bcf5e637/1774912181517/Blank_BTO_Wafer.jpg" alt="Wafer" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/718x435/121212/FFFFFF?text=Image+Not+Found';">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- CHIP -->
      <div id="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-cabinet" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item" data-pill-text="Chip">
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-text">
          <h2 class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-title">Chip</h2>
          <p class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description">
            Photonic qubits are implemented by repurposing integrated photonics technology, originally developed for telecom and datacenter networking applications.<br><br>
            Entangled states — specially designed to implement quantum error-correcting codes — are created and measured using fusion gates.<br><br>
            Nondeterministic photon sources and gate operations are made scalable via a combination of multiplexing and loss-tolerant error correcting codes
          </p>
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-specs">
            <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-item">
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-title">SINGLE-QUBIT FIDELITY</span>
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-value">99.99% <a href="#footnotes"><sup>1</sup></a></span>
            </div>
            <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-item">
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-title">TWO-QUBIT FIDELITY</span>
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-value">>99% <a href="#footnotes"><sup>2</sup></a></span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-image">
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-image-wrapper">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/685c56753af6eb44b65ae337/1750881914481/chip-2.jpg" alt="Chip" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/718x435/121212/FFFFFF?text=Image+Not+Found';">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- PACKAGE -->
      <div id="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-blade" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item" data-pill-text="Package">
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-text">
          <h2 class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-title">Package</h2>
          <p class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description">
            Photonic chips are integrated with cryogenic control electronics into a manufacturable package.<br><br>
            Despite the fact that some of these packages must be operated at cryogenic temperature, we are able to use conventional technologies — PCBs, copper heat sinks and bump bonding. As a result, PsiQuantum can leverage conventional contract manufacturing to build large numbers of packages quickly.<br><br>
            Photonic qubits can be networked and modularized using standard optical fiber, without transduction — a huge advantage at scale.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-image">
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-image-wrapper">
            <img src="https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/46f11c00-68eb-4b73-be73-172ffd72c848/technology+-+package+blurred+logos.png?content-type=image%2Fpng" alt="Package" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/718x435/121212/FFFFFF?text=Image+Not+Found';">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- BLADE -->
      <div id="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-package" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item" data-pill-text="Blade">
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-text">
          <h2 class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-title">Blade</h2>
          <p class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description">
            Building a utility-scale quantum computer requires installing thousands of photonic packages. We adopt a proven model from classical computing: modular, rack-based infrastructure.
            Conventional supercomputers are increasingly turning to liquid cooling as density and TDP increases. We cool our chips using liquid helium, which ﬂows through a cryogenically-cooled copper backplane — analogous to the backplane in a conventional server rack. <br><br>
            Our blade is the scalable unit of cryogenic quantum computing racking. It houses many individual photonic-packages networked together with fiber and control signals.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-image">
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-image-wrapper">
            <img src="https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/ac8e1e8b-51ee-4fc9-8e6d-49834afcc510/Blade+%28transparent%29.png?content-type=image%2Fpng" alt="Blade" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/718x435/121212/FFFFFF?text=Image+Not+Found';">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- CABINET -->
      <div id="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-chip" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item" data-pill-text="Cabinet">
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-text">
          <h2 class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-title">Cabinet</h2>
          <p class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description">
            The dilution refrigerator—or ‘chandelier’—has become an iconic image of quantum computing, yet it is severely constrained in both the number of chips it can cool simultaneously and its overall cooling capacity.
            <br><br>
            Because photons are unaﬀected by heat, our systems can operate at temperatures more than 100 times higher than those required for superconducting qubits. This higher operating temperature enables PsiQuantum to move beyond the chandelier to far simpler, high-density cryogenic cabinets, analogous to datacenter racks. Each cabinet provides thousands of times the cooling power of the largest dilution refrigerator ever built,<a href="#footnotes"><sup>3</sup></a> and can accommodate hundreds of quantum chips.
          </p>
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-specs">
            <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-item">
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-title">COOLING POWER PER CABINET</span>
              <span class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-spec-value">~30W</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-image">
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-image-wrapper">
            <img src="https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/6b8713cf-1a5a-4e68-b0bb-572244714223/Beta+%28transparent%29+%281%29.png?content-type=image%2Fpng" alt="Cabinet" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/718x435/121212/FFFFFF?text=Image+Not+Found';">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- QUANTUM COMPUTER -->
      <div id="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-wafer" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item" data-pill-text="Quantum Computer">
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-text">
          <h2 class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-title">Quantum Computer</h2>
          <p class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description">
            Most architectures for quantum computing will require major physical infrastructure in order to deliver enough qubits for commercially useful applications and to scale far beyond.<br><br>
            In 2024, PsiQuantum announced two landmark partnerships with the Australian Federal and Queensland State governments, as well as the State of Illinois and the City of Chicago, to build its first utility-scale quantum computers in Brisbane and Chicago. Recognizing quantum as a critical capability for the future, these partnerships underscore the urgency toward building and deploying million-qubit systems. In 2025, PsiQuantum broke ground on America's largest quantum computing project at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park in Chicago––and the company will soon break ground on its facility in Australia. 
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-image">
          <div class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-image-wrapper">
            <img src="https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/02157603-cb01-43bd-b394-e54066159e16/Site+Schematic+-+Perspective.png?content-type=image%2Fpng" alt="Quantum Computer Site" class="blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/718x435/121212/FFFFFF?text=Image+Not+Found';">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    (function(){
      const activeClassName='active';
      const currentlyActiveClassName='currently-active';
      let currentSlideIndex=0;
      let autoPlayInterval=null;
      let mobileScrollListener=null;

      function handleMobileContentHeight(){
        if(!window.matchMedia("(max-width: 991px)").matches) return;

        const wrapper=document.getElementById('blueprintSlider2OutterAllSlidesWrapper');
        const slides=wrapper.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item');
        if(!slides.length) return;

        const firstDesc=slides[0].querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description');
        if(!firstDesc) return;

        const baseHeight=firstDesc.offsetHeight;

        slides.forEach(slide=>{
          const description=slide.querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description');
          const textColumn=slide.querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-column-text');
          if(!description||!textColumn) return;

          const existingBtn=textColumn.querySelector('.see-more-btn');
          if(existingBtn) existingBtn.remove();

          description.classList.remove('collapsed');
          description.style.maxHeight='';

          if(description.scrollHeight>baseHeight+5){
            description.classList.add('collapsed');
            description.style.maxHeight=`${baseHeight}px`;

            const seeMoreBtn=document.createElement('button');
            seeMoreBtn.textContent='See more ->';
            seeMoreBtn.className='see-more-btn';
            description.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', seeMoreBtn);

            seeMoreBtn.addEventListener('click',()=>{
              description.classList.remove('collapsed');
              description.style.maxHeight=description.scrollHeight+'px';
              seeMoreBtn.remove();
            },{once:true});
          }
        });
      }

      function renderDesktopSlide(index, slides, paginationEl, userInteracted=false){
        slides.forEach((item,idx)=>item.classList.toggle(activeClassName, idx===index));

        const pills=paginationEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill');
        pills.forEach(p=>p.classList.remove(currentlyActiveClassName));

        pills.forEach((pill,pillIndex)=>{
          const progress=pill.querySelector('.pill-progress');
          if(userInteracted){
            pill.classList.toggle(activeClassName, pillIndex===index);
            if(pillIndex===index) pill.classList.add(currentlyActiveClassName);
            if(progress){progress.style.transition='none';progress.style.width=pillIndex===index?'100%':'0%';}
          }else{
            if(pillIndex<index){pill.classList.add(activeClassName); if(progress){progress.style.transition='none';progress.style.width='100%';}}
            else if(pillIndex===index){
              pill.classList.add(activeClassName,'currently-active');
              if(progress){
                progress.style.transition='none';progress.style.width='0%';
                void progress.offsetWidth;
                progress.style.transition='width 7s linear';progress.style.width='100%';
              }
            }else{
              pill.classList.remove(activeClassName);
              if(progress){progress.style.transition='none';progress.style.width='0%';}
            }
          }
        });
      }

      function scrollActivePillIntoView(paginationEl){
        const activePill=paginationEl.querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill.active');
        if(activePill){
          activePill.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest',inline:'center'});
        }
      }

      function updateMobilePills(index, paginationEl){
        const pills=paginationEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill');
        pills.forEach((pill,pillIndex)=>{
          pill.classList.toggle(activeClassName, pillIndex===index);
          pill.classList.toggle(currentlyActiveClassName, pillIndex===index);
        });
      }

      function showMobileSlide(index, slides){
        const wrapper=document.getElementById('blueprintSlider2OutterAllSlidesWrapper');
        const target=slides[index];
        if(wrapper && target){
          wrapper.scrollTo({left: target.offsetLeft, behavior:'smooth'});
        }
      }

      function createPagination(paginationEl, slides){
        paginationEl.innerHTML='';
        slides.forEach((slide, index)=>{
          const pillText=slide.dataset.pillText || `Slide ${index+1}`;
          const pill=document.createElement('div');
          pill.classList.add('blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-pill');
          if(pillText==="Quantum Computer"){pill.classList.add('pill--no-grow');}

          pill.dataset.index=index;

          const progress=document.createElement('div');
          progress.classList.add('pill-progress');
          pill.appendChild(progress);

          const span=document.createElement('span');
          span.textContent=pillText;
          pill.appendChild(span);

          pill.addEventListener('click',()=>{
            if(currentSlideIndex!==index){
              currentSlideIndex=index;
              if(window.matchMedia("(max-width: 991px)").matches){
                showMobileSlide(currentSlideIndex, slides);
                updateMobilePills(currentSlideIndex, paginationEl);
                scrollActivePillIntoView(paginationEl);
              }else{
                if(autoPlayInterval){clearInterval(autoPlayInterval);autoPlayInterval=null;}
                renderDesktopSlide(currentSlideIndex, slides, paginationEl, true);
              }
            }
          });

          paginationEl.appendChild(pill);
        });
      }

      function initSlider(){
        const paginationEl=document.getElementById('blueprintSlider2OutterPaginationContainer');
        const wrapper=document.getElementById('blueprintSlider2OutterAllSlidesWrapper');
        if(!paginationEl||!wrapper) return;

        const slides=wrapper.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item');
        if(!slides.length) return;

        createPagination(paginationEl, slides);

        if(autoPlayInterval) clearInterval(autoPlayInterval);
        if(mobileScrollListener) wrapper.removeEventListener('scroll', mobileScrollListener);

        if(window.matchMedia("(max-width: 991px)").matches){
          const isSquarespaceEditMode=document.body.classList.contains('sqs-edit-mode-active');
          updateMobilePills(currentSlideIndex, paginationEl);
          if(!isSquarespaceEditMode){handleMobileContentHeight();}

          let scrollTimeout;
          mobileScrollListener=()=>{
            clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
            scrollTimeout=setTimeout(()=>{
              const scrollLeft=wrapper.scrollLeft;
              const slideWidth=wrapper.offsetWidth;
              const newIndex=Math.round(scrollLeft/slideWidth);
              if(newIndex!==currentSlideIndex){
                currentSlideIndex=newIndex;
                updateMobilePills(currentSlideIndex, paginationEl);
                scrollActivePillIntoView(paginationEl);
              }
            },150);
          };
          wrapper.addEventListener('scroll', mobileScrollListener);
        }else{
          // Desktop: clean mobile artifacts
          wrapper.style.height='';
          slides.forEach(item=>{
            const desc=item.querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-content-description');
            const btn=item.querySelector('.see-more-btn');
            if(desc){desc.classList.remove('collapsed');desc.style.maxHeight='';}
            if(btn) btn.remove();
          });

          // Stabilize height from first slide
          const firstSlide=slides[0];
          if(firstSlide){
            firstSlide.classList.add(activeClassName);
            const fixedHeight=firstSlide.offsetHeight;
            wrapper.style.height=`${fixedHeight}px`;
            firstSlide.classList.remove(activeClassName);
          }

          renderDesktopSlide(currentSlideIndex, slides, paginationEl);

          autoPlayInterval=setInterval(()=>{
            const items=wrapper.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-outter-slide-item');
            currentSlideIndex=(currentSlideIndex+1)%items.length;
            renderDesktopSlide(currentSlideIndex, items, paginationEl);
          },7000);
        }
      }

      async function main(){await document.fonts.ready;initSlider();}
      if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', main);}else{main();}

      let resizeTimeout;
      window.addEventListener('resize', ()=>{
        clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
        resizeTimeout=setTimeout(initSlider, 250);
      });
    })();
  </script>



  
</div>
</div></div></div></div></div>
    </div>
  
  </div>

    minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
  row-gap: 11.0px;
  column-gap: 11.0px;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  overflow-x: clip;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .background-width--inset .fe-67a3be895c573668f4f3970d {
    --inset-padding: calc(var(--sqs-site-gutter) * 2);
  }

  .fe-67a3be895c573668f4f3970d {
    --grid-gutter: calc(var(--sqs-site-gutter, 4vw) - 11.0px);
    --cell-max-width: calc( ( var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px) - (11.0px * (24 - 1)) ) / 24 );
    --inset-padding: 0vw;

    --row-height-scaling-factor: 0.0215;
    --container-width: min(var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px), calc(100vw - var(--sqs-site-gutter, 4vw) * 2 - var(--inset-padding) ));

    grid-template-rows: repeat(12,minmax(calc(var(--container-width) * var(--row-height-scaling-factor)), auto));
    grid-template-columns:

      repeat(24, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
      minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
  }
}
